descricao: Revisão inteligente de erros · Flashcards + Múltipla Escolha

cards.frase: There is a pattern to every miracle.
Every miracle in the Bible follows a pattern.
It changes the way you look at your own setbacks.

cards.definicao: topo da montanha (fig. momento de sucesso)
cards.frase: We pray for the mountaintop moments of fulfillment.
The higher the peak, the deeper the foundation.
The deeper the foundation has to go.
We want the purpose, the strength, the anointing.
We want it without the struggle.
Without the waiting, without the breaking.
Joseph was betrayed and thrown into prison.
David spent years on the run, hiding in caves.
He was expanding their capacity to carry what was coming.
Digging deep into the bedrock of your soul.
So that you can sustain the height.
Sustain the height that he is calling you to.
